license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.vvve666
title: Recombinase polymerase amplification assay for detection of Mycobacterium ulcerans DNA
author: Michael Frimpong

steps_raw.instruction: For each sample, prepare a mastermix as follows: 2.1 μl of Mu_RPA F1 (10μM), 2.1 μl of Mu_RPA R2 (10μM), 0.6 μl of Mu-RPA P (10μM), 29.5 μl of Rehydration Buffer and 8.2 μl of dH2O.
Vortex to mix and spin down.
Transfer 42.5 µL of mix to each TwistAmp exo reaction pellet. Mix by pipetting up and down until the entire pellet has been resuspended.
Add 5 µL of the DNA template to the mix.
For each sample, add 2.5 µL 280 mM magnesium acetate and mix well.
Insert the tubes in Axxin T8 Isothermal device and run at the set program. 00:15:00 42 °C
After 4 minutes, take the samples out and vortex to mix 00:00:05 , spin down and return the samples to the T8 device.
Continue the incubation/detection for a total incubation time of 15 minutes.
